name: Local Clarity
description:
What is Local Clarity?

Local Clarity is a full-service local SEO platform developed for agencies with multiple locations. It manages and optimizes clients' business listings across different locations.

Local Clarity provides extensive visibility into local search rankings, competitor insights, and online reviews. By doing so, your client can execute strategic optimizations and improve their ranking in map packs. It also enables agencies to automate tasks, deliver better reporting, and drive more foot traffic & sales for local businesses.

Source: g2.com

Key features

Some of the key features of Local Clarity include:

  • Integration with other tools for seamless workflow.
  • SEO reviews and insights are all featured on the dashboard.
  • Dashboard with a single view of analytics, project management, and important schedules.
  • Managed services like social media posting and scheduling.
  • Chat features with customers.
  • Seamless workflows.

Benefits of Using Local Clarity

Companies that use Local Clarity enjoy these benefits:

  • Easy exchange of data with other tools. It integrates with dozens of other tools.
  • It provides insights regarding the effectiveness of local SEO efforts. For example, it helps:some text
    • Track competitors
    • Track performance
    • Discover actionable insights

These insights help businesses improve their local search and map rankings.

  • It helps businesses take control of their operations by populating and simplifying local searches on one dashboard.
  • It facilitates easy communication between the agency and team members on one hand, and the agency and customers on the other.

Pricing

It is based on the location

  • Plus plan @ $10/Per Location
  • Pro plan @ $12/Per Location

Pros

  • Highly scalable
  • Increased integration
  • Managed services

Cons

Poor white labeling
